summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 22/01/2025
Today, iron ore fluctuated upward. The most-traded contract I2505 finally closed at 800.5 yuan/mt, down 0.44% throughoutthe day. Traders showed moderate willingness to sell.
